title: Spawn Rules Document
description: A spawn rules definition document for Minecraft Bedrock Edition. This describes the complete JSON file structure including format_version and the minecraft:spawn_rules wrapper.

format_version.title: Format Version
format_version.description: The format version of this spawn rules file.

defaultSnippets.label: Spawn Rules
defaultSnippets.description: Defines the complete spawn rules for an entity type, including population control group, spawn conditions (biome, light, difficulty, etc.), and herd configuration. This is the root structure of a spawn_rules JSON file in behavior packs.
